Variables.Name: MemberParent
Variables.Description:
Most often the Class that this member is defined in. Could be a UPackage 
	  if it is a native delegate signature function (declared globally). Should 
	  be NULL if bSelfContext is true.

Variables.Name: bSelfContext
Variables.Description: Whether or not this should be a "self" context

Variables.Name: bWasDeprecated
Variables.Description: Whether or not this property has been deprecated
